description: issue #331: with the educational profile active, a typo of `explain` (`explian`) is within did-you-mean edit distance (spec/error-model.md:129-151) and suggests the correctly-spelled meta-command — the same did-you-mean machinery Turtle & Rendering's `fowad`->`forward` case exercises (tests/conformance/turtle-rendering/check/fowad-suggests-forward). Parenthesized form isolates the finding from the reader's arity-0 fallback for an unrecognized bare callee.

diagnostics.message: i don't know how to explian. did you mean explain?
